locations.name: National Museum of Natural History
locations.description: An iconic iron lattice tower on the Champ de Mars in Paris, France. It is named after the engineer Gustave Eiffel, whose company designed and built the tower. Experience breathtaking views of Paris from its observation decks.

locations.name: National Museum of Anthropology
locations.description: The Colosseum is an oval amphitheatre in the centre of Rome, Italy. Built of concrete and sand, it is the largest amphitheatre ever built and one of the greatest works of Roman architecture.

locations.name: National Museum of Fine Arts
locations.description: Big Ben is the nickname for the Great Bell of the striking clock at the north end of the Palace of Westminster in London. The tower is officially known as Elizabeth Tower, renamed in 2012.

locations.name: Digital National Art Museum (DNA Museum)
locations.description: The Taj Mahal is an ivory-white marble mausoleum on the southern bank of the river Yamuna in the Indian city of Agra. A UNESCO World Heritage Site and symbol of eternal love.

locations.name: Fort Santiago
locations.description: The world's largest art museum and a historic monument in Paris, France. Home to thousands of works of art, including the Mona Lisa and the Venus de Milo.

locations.name: Intramuros
locations.description: A contemporary art museum featuring works from modern artists around the world. Interactive exhibits and rotating collections make each visit unique.

locations.name: Rizal Park
locations.description: Experience authentic local cuisine at this bustling street food market. Featuring dozens of vendors offering traditional dishes and modern fusion creations.

locations.name: Baluarte de San Diego
locations.description: An upscale food hall featuring artisanal food stalls, craft beverages, and specialty ingredients from around the world.

locations.name: Corregidor Island
locations.description: Relax at this pristine beach resort featuring crystal-clear waters, white sand beaches, and world-class amenities. Perfect for families and couples seeking a tropical paradise.

locations.name: Baler Public Market
locations.description: A beautiful coastal destination offering water sports, beachfront dining, and stunning sunset views. Ideal for adventure seekers and relaxation enthusiasts alike.

locations.name: Baguio Night Market
locations.description: A beautiful coastal destination offering water sports, beachfront dining, and stunning sunset views. Ideal for adventure seekers and relaxation enthusiasts alike.

tripRoutes.name: Paris City Explorer
tripRoutes.route: CDG Airport → Metro Line 1 → Champ de Mars → Eiffel Tower
tripRoutes.transportation: Metro (Line 6 or RER C to Champ de Mars)
tripRoutes.bestTime: Early morning (9-10am) or late evening (7-9pm) for sunset views

tripRoutes.name: Ancient Rome Circuit
tripRoutes.route: Termini Station → Metro Line B → Colosseo Station → Roman Forum → Colosseum

tripRoutes.name: London Historic Walk
tripRoutes.route: Westminster Tube → Parliament Square → Big Ben → Westminster Abbey

tripRoutes.name: Agra Heritage Tour
tripRoutes.route: Delhi → Yamuna Expressway → Agra → Taj Mahal East Gate
tripRoutes.transportation: Train (Gatimaan Express) or Car (3-4 hour drive)
tripRoutes.bestTime: Sunrise (6-8am) for magical lighting and fewer tourists

tripRoutes.name: Paris Art & Culture
tripRoutes.route: Palais Royal-Musée du Louvre Metro → Louvre Pyramid Entrance
tripRoutes.bestTime: Wednesday or Friday evenings (extended hours, fewer crowds)

tripRoutes.name: Bangkok Street Food Adventure
tripRoutes.route: BTS Skytrain → Street Market District → Walking Food Tour
tripRoutes.bestTime: Evening (6-9pm) when markets are most vibrant

tripRoutes.name: Maldives Island Escape
tripRoutes.route: Velana International Airport → Speedboat Transfer → Resort Island
